relationships: QualityPolicy triggers communication to all roles
decision_points: IF leadership_commitment_evidence missing THEN schedule management_review within 30 days
IF quality_objectives not measurable THEN return to planning for revision
rules: QualityPolicy must include commitment to ISO9001 requirements and continual improvement
All OrganizationalRoles must have documented authority and responsibility assignments

data_requirements: quality_policy_text: string stored as versioned document
role_assignments: array of objects {role, responsibility, authority, assignee}
communication_records: array of objects {date, method, audience_count, evidence_url}
failure_modes: Leadership absence causes missing commitment_evidence and audit non-conformance
Policy not communicated leads to low awareness and KPI failure
Unaligned objectives cause resource waste and missed targets

agent_spec.decision_logic: On triggers or data changes, check decision_points and rules; create evidence or schedule reviews if gaps found, revise unmeasurable objectives, enforce annual review and communication thresholds
escalation_rules: communication_rate below 0.95 or review_frequency below annual

sop:
# SOP — Leadership and Quality Policy
**Process ID:** ISO9001-5
**Framework:** ISO 9001:2015 | **Domain:** ISO 9001
**Generated:** 2026-06-10

## Purpose
Leadership commitment, quality policy establishment and communication, organizational roles responsibilities and authorities for the QMS

## Triggers
- annual_strategic_planning_cycle_start
- management_review_meeting_scheduled
- major_organizational_change_event

## Inputs Required
- strategic direction
- quality objectives
- organizational structure
- resource plans

## Process Steps
1. IF leadership_commitment_evidence missing THEN schedule management_review within 30 days
2. IF quality_objectives not measurable THEN return to planning for revision

## Expected Outputs
- quality policy
- quality objectives
- role assignments
- management commitment evidence

## Business Rules
- QualityPolicy must include commitment to ISO9001 requirements and continual improvement
- All OrganizationalRoles must have documented authority and responsibility assignments
- QualityPolicy must be reviewed at least annually or after strategic changes

## Exception Handling
- Organizations under 10 employees may combine multiple roles into single assignment with documented justification
- Pharma and defense sectors require additional compliance_flags documentation before policy approval

## Success Criteria
- policy_communication_rate >= 0.95
- objective_achievement_rate >= 0.80
- management_review_frequency >= 1 per year

## Compliance Requirements
- ISO 9001:2015 Clause 5
- corporate governance
test_cases: Test 1: description of happy path test
deployment_notes: Agent ready for deployment. Compliance: ISO 9001:2015 Clause 5, corporate governance
